Source: Copilot Studio What's New
URL: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-copilot-studio/whats-new
Fetched: 2026-03-19

# Copilot Studio What's New

## March 2026
- (Preview) Work IQ tools connecting Microsoft 365 Copilot and agents to Work IQ service for real-time work insights

## February 2026
- Improved agent responses for ticket-based Microsoft 365 Graph connectors (ServiceNow, Azure DevOps)
- Claude Sonnet 4.5 (beta) available for Computer Use agents
- Prompt builder enhancements: content moderation sensitivity per prompt, Claude Opus 4.6/Sonnet 4.5 model selection, inline editing of prompt instructions

## January 2026
- Agent evaluations: thumbs-up/down feedback, activity maps, CSV template for test sets
- Computer use expansions: new model support, built-in credentials, enhanced audit logging with session replay, Cloud PC pooling
- VS Code extension GA for building/editing agents

## December 2025
- Compare multiple agent versions side by side for evaluation

## November 2025
- GPT-5 Chat GA for European and US regions
- Microsoft Entra agent identities (Preview)
- Improved SharePoint knowledge retrieval with tenant graph grounding
- SharePoint metadata filters for knowledge retrieval
- Multi-agent orchestration including Microsoft Fabric data agents
- Tool groups for faster agent setup
- Copy agents from M365 Copilot to Copilot Studio
- Request for information action (Preview)
- Component collections enhancements

## October 2025
- GPT-4o retired, GPT-4.1 new default model
- Multiple AI model selection
- GPT-5 models (Preview)
- Copilot Studio Kit for testing custom agents
- Themes analytics (Preview)
- Time and cost savings tracking
- Unified activity and transcript view
- MCP server support
- Agent evaluation with test sets (Preview)

## September 2025
- Computer-Using Agents (CUA) Preview
- Client SDK for Android, iOS, Windows
- Code interpreter for file analysis (Preview)

## August 2025
- Code interpreter GA
- File groups GA
- File and image upload support
- Generated answer rate and quality analytics
- MCP server guided onboarding

## July 2025
- Advanced NLU customization
- In-app search
- ROI analytics
- MIP sensitivity labels (Preview)
- WhatsApp channel support
- SSO Consent Card (Preview)

## June 2025
- Improved tools experience with grouping/filtering
- M365 Copilot Tuning support (Preview)
- Power Fx in prompt builder
- Generative orchestration for all supported languages (Preview)

Last updated: 2026-03-09
